name: YFIT Social Media Automation v3
description: v3: Added UTM links to all captions, /go landing page CTAs, medication campaign trigger

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.script, model_id: "eleven_turbo_v2", voice_settings: { stability: 0.5, similarity_boost: 0.8, style: 0.3, use_speaker_boost: true } }) }}

nodes.name: Split by Video Platform
nodes.notes: v3 UPDATE: Appends platform-specific UTM links to every caption before posting. TikTok/Instagram say 'Link in bio' (bio holds the UTM link). YouTube/Facebook get full clickable URLs.

nodes.name: Upload-Post — Post Video
nodes.notes: Posts video to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook via Upload-Post API. Caption now includes UTM link.

nodes.name: Prepare Text Posts
nodes.notes: v3 UPDATE: LinkedIn captions now include UTM signup link. Pinterest gets a destination_url for the pin click-through.

nodes.name: Upload-Post — Post Text
nodes.notes: v3 UPDATE: Pinterest now passes destination_url so pin clicks go to /go UTM page.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "YFIT content generated and posted to all platforms", "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}" }

nodes.name: Manual Test Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Test workflow' to run a test. Feeds sample data into the pipeline.

nodes.name: Test Data (Medication Campaign)
nodes.notes: v3 UPDATE: Pre-loaded with the medication angle script. Set dry_run: false to post for real. Change pexels_query to adjust B-roll footage.
